change_summary: Recorded a reproducible accepted-stack low-MFE stopout taxonomy artifact; no production strategy code changed.
hypothesis: Accepted-stack losers may contain a reproducible low-MFE stopout lifecycle family where positions never achieve even 1 percent favorable excursion before stopping out, distinct from instant-failure, late-rollover, breakout, giveback, add-on, weak-hold, and overnight-gap families.
notes: Artifact: docs/experiments/artifacts/exp_20260426_052_low_mfe_stopout_audit.json. Low-MFE threshold <1%; 10/32 bad trades, -4435.89 PnL; 3 previously unclassified trend stopouts, -1454.72 PnL; zero winner collateral observed under this lifecycle label.

locked_variables: low-MFE stopout taxonomy for accepted-stack bad trades
parameters.single_causal_variable: low-MFE stopout taxonomy for accepted-stack bad trades
